name: metaplex-agent-template
description: Template for building Metaplex Agent Registry agents

scripts.dev: pnpm db:up && pnpm --filter @metaplex-agent/shared --filter @metaplex-agent/core build && pnpm --filter @metaplex-agent/server dev
scripts.dev:all: pnpm db:up && pnpm --filter @metaplex-agent/shared --filter @metaplex-agent/core build && pnpm --filter @metaplex-agent/server --filter @metaplex-agent/ui dev
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose exec -T postgres sh -c 'until pg_isready -U timemachine -d timemachine -q; do sleep 0.5; done'
